body.title: UU ./uu launcher: bootstrap + Librarian chat via configurable frontend shim
body.result: ./uu launcher: bootstrap (uv/pip), config-driven frontend selection (terminal REPL or web), Librarian channel routing with graceful degradation. Librarian device stub + config.cfg template.
body.description:
Implement the ./uu entry point at repo root. Bootstrap (same as ./igor: venv, install, instance discovery from ~/.UnseenUniversity/). Then launch a chat interface connected to Librarian — the human-facing 'what do I know about X?' surface.

Frontend: research and select an existing open-source terminal chat library (candidate: opencode from SST, or similar CC-style TUI) rather than building new UI. Frontend configured via uu.cfg default_frontend (terminal|web) with per-device override in Librarian/config.cfg and launch-flag override (./uu --frontend=web). Web option points to existing web server device.

The shim principle: any agent gets the same console option by changing shim config — not a bespoke UI per agent.

**Affected files:** ./uu (new launcher at repo root), devices/librarian/config.cfg (frontend field), ~/.UnseenUniversity/uu.cfg (default_frontend field), possibly new devices/uu_chat/ shim
**Design rules:** all internals hidden from user except elevation/install prompts; bootstrap identical to ./igor; frontend selection is config-driven not hardcoded
**Scope boundary:** IN — ./uu bootstrap, frontend selection, Librarian chat connection; OUT — building a new chat UI from scratch (use existing library); OUT — igor or superclaude launchers (those are T-uu-root-launchers)
**Test plan:** ./uu on clean clone runs bootstrap without error; launches chat interface connected to Librarian; ./uu --frontend=web opens browser to web server; uu.cfg default_frontend=terminal uses terminal UI
